items.html: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines released Inkling, an open 975B-parameter multimodal model reasoning natively across text, image, audio, and video — free to use and fine-tune.
Meta scrapped its Muse Image AI tool and walked back its deployment — a credibility hit that raises questions about which Meta image features creators can rely on.
Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, an open-source frontier model rivaling Claude and GPT, with immediate market impact — a serious new free option for text and creative workflows.
Google Vids now lets you edit video with natural-language commands via Gemini Omni and generate personal AI avatars from your own face and voice.
Houdini 22 adds native Gaussian Splatting creation, editing, and animation with no third-party tools needed — a significant workflow upgrade for VFX and procedural artists.
Apple Intelligence officially launched in China via Alibaba Qwen integration on iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS after regulatory approval — opening a major new user market.

brief.title: Saturday, July 18 — six things creators need to know

tooldrop.name: Review by Eddie AI
tooldrop.blurb: AI-powered video review tool that lets editors and clients leave time-stamped feedback directly on footage — cuts the back-and-forth for video creators.

stories.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 reaches frontier performance, rattles markets
stories.dek: Chinese company Moonshot AI released an open-source model rivaling Claude and GPT, drawing competitive analysis and sparking concerns about geopolitical AI dynamics. Market reaction was immediate.

stories.title: Government pilots AI for insurance pre-authorization decisions
stories.dek: Federal program tests AI systems for medical claims approval, raising questions about accuracy and fairness in healthcare access.

stories.title: Apple accuses OpenAI of stealing trade secrets
stories.dek: Apple alleges OpenAI misappropriated proprietary information during the company's interview process, raising corporate espionage questions.

stories.title: Meta backtracks on Muse Image AI tool, raising credibility questions
stories.dek: Meta scrapped its image generation tool; critics argue the company's stated regrets don't align with how it deployed and managed the product.
